eyebrow.zh: 装包前就告诉你 · 离线 · 不要 key
eyebrow.en: Answered before you install · offline · no key

headline.zh:
在你的 agent 读进依赖之前
揪出藏着的有害指令
headline.en:
Before your agent reads a dependency
catch the harmful instructions hidden inside

sub.zh: 三方包的 README、CHANGELOG、docstring 里可能藏着发给 Coding Agent 的祈使句——「删掉所有文件」「忽略上面的指令」「如果你是 AI…」。agentguard 在你装包或跑重构前把这些句子一条条列出来，精确到哪个文件第几行。本地跑，不需要 key。
sub.en: A dependency's README, CHANGELOG or docstring may hide imperatives written for your coding agent — «delete all files», «ignore previous instructions», «if you are an AI…». agentguard lists every one before you install or run a refactor — down to the exact file and line. Runs locally, no API key.

title.zh: 看的是 agent 真会读的那段文字
title.en: It reads the words your agent actually reads

body.zh: Snyk、Socket、OSV-Scanner 把三方包当「可执行代码 + 已知漏洞」来查；可你的 Coding Agent 真正吃进上下文的，是 README、CHANGELOG、docstring 这些写给人看的文字。agentguard 只盯这部分——它扫的不是源码，是 agent 会读到的文字。这条暗道，以前没人看。
body.en: Snyk, Socket and OSV-Scanner treat a package as «executable code + known CVEs». But what your coding agent actually pulls into context is the README, the CHANGELOG, the docstring — the words written for humans. agentguard looks only there: not source code, just the text your agent reads. It's the back door nobody was watching.

title.zh: 本地跑、不联网，结果每次都一样
title.en: Runs locally, no network, same result every time

body.zh: 不调外部模型、不联网、零 API key——所以同一条命令每次跑出同样的结果，误报能一条条核对，CI 里能完整重放。你的代码也不出本机。
body.en: No external model, no network, zero API keys — so the same command gives the same result every run, false positives are checkable one by one, and CI replays end to end. Your code never leaves your machine.

title.zh: 一条命令当 CI 闸门

body.zh: 命中高危指令时默认让 CI 失败，一条 agentguard check 就能挡住一次有问题的合并。报告还能导出成 GitHub 安全视图和 VS Code 直接打开的标准格式——不用换工具栈。
body.en: When it finds a high-severity directive it fails CI by default — one agentguard check blocks a risky merge. The report also exports to the standard format GitHub's security view and VS Code open natively — no toolchain switch.

title.zh: npm · PyPI · Go 一次扫全
title.en: npm, PyPI, Go — all in one pass

body.zh: 前端、Python、Go 的依赖树一次过；之后只复查内容真正变过的包，CI 不会每次从头重扫整棵树。
body.en: Front-end, Python and Go dependency trees in one pass; afterwards it re-checks only the packages whose contents actually changed, so CI never rescans the whole tree from scratch.

headline.zh: 供应链扫描器只看代码和 CVE；可你的 agent 读的是包里的文字
headline.en: Supply-chain scanners read code and CVEs; your agent reads the words inside the package

sub.zh: 开源、MIT、无付费墙。一条命令就能在 CI 里把这条暗道堵死。
sub.en: Open source, MIT, no paywall. One command closes this back door right in your CI.

tag.zh: Coding Agent 时代，看住依赖里藏着的指令
tag.en: Watching the instructions hidden in your dependencies — for the coding-agent era
